signals.headline: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Trump's indefinite extension of the Iran ceasefire on April 22, 2026, removed geopolitical risk premiums, driving Bitcoin to $77,541 (+2.2%) and Ethereum to $2,390 (+0.7%), with broader crypto market cap up 4% to $2.6T amid risk-on sentiment.[2][4]

signals.headline: Strategy Discloses $2
signals.raw:
Strategy Discloses $2.54B Bitcoin Purchase | YES | HIGH confidence**  
MicroStrategy revealed a $2.54B BTC buy on April 22, boosting holdings past 815,000 coins and absorbing ~3x April's global miner supply, fueling BTC breakout above $76K and short unwinds.[4]
